name: Open Folder Trigger
summary: Frontend trigger button and action card for initiating the open-folder workflow
goals: Provide a clear entry point for opening local folders
Trigger the native folder dialog via the backend

specDetail.description: An ActionCard component that provides the 'Open Folder' button. When clicked, it triggers the backend native dialog endpoint and processes the returned folder path.

parameters.name: onFolderSelected
parameters.description: Callback invoked with the selected folder path

parameters.name: disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger when a dialog is already open

constraints: Must prevent multiple simultaneous dialog opens
Must show loading state while dialog is open

acceptanceCriteria.given: the user is on the project management page
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user clicks the 'Open Folder' action card
acceptanceCriteria.then: a native OS folder picker dialog appears

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
